title: Oracle HCM Cloud Training
description:
Oracle HCM Cloud training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Oracle HCM Cloud training as per your pace.

Oracle Fusion Cloud Human Capital Management (HCM) is a perfect solution built on cloud platform which connects each and every human resource (HR) processes starting from recruiting employees to the process of retires. It is a cloud-based software application chambers used for global human resource, talent, and workforce management released by Oracle Corporation in the year 2011. Oracle published the updated version HCM Cloud 8 in February 2014, which made further changes to talent acquisition, time and attendance, workforce modeling, presentation management, and succession planning components. The Oracle HCM Cloud is a detailed Human Resources Management System (HRMS) solution for all mid-size to large enterprises. It not only assists all sizes of enterprises just to control their basic HR functions, but also control planned tasks all over the organization. Oracle HCM Cloud also simplifies routine HR functions using artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) features such as digital assistants and virtual reality. Oracle HCM cloud allows HR heads by supplying a complete solution to control each & every phase of the employee lifecycle, starting from alluring talent, screening, recruiting, onboarding, governing time and attendance, controlling income, remuneration and benefits, controlling performance and developing the young talents.

Complete Customization of Oracle HCM Cloud training’s course content is possible for Individual students and for Corporate.  Oracle HCM Cloud online training is available for individuals and for corporate we may arrange the classroom as well. For more information on Oracle HCM Cloud training do connect us.
